epigraph.quote: I liked Brancusi Fish 1926. Bronze fish on a bronze pond. Not fins + scales but the essence of its spirit.

moments.quote: we drove to Coleshill & bought a Brompton folding bike

moments.place: Royal Air Force Museum London, Hendon
moments.quote: Peter went on a flight simulator. John liked the Radar. Charles liked looking at the model aeroplanes.

images.caption: The Queen at this 12 June performance Triumphs & Mirth, 1997

moments.quote: We shan't be coming to Picketts Lock again, because it the cinema building is being demolished for a national athletics centre.
